actions.name: create_website
actions.risk: medium risk Crisp mutation for 'Creates a new website.'; requires reverse ETL plan, preview, and approval

actions.name: delete_website
actions.risk: high risk Crisp destructive mutation for 'Deletes an existing website.'; requires reverse ETL plan, preview, approval, and typed destructive confirmation

actions.name: abort_website_deletion
actions.risk: high risk Crisp destructive mutation for 'Aborts scheduled deletion for an existing website.'; requires reverse ETL plan, preview, approval, and typed destructive confirmation

actions.name: delete_suggested_conversation_segment

actions.name: delete_suggested_conversation_data_key
actions.risk: high risk Crisp destructive mutation for 'Deletes a suggested conversation data key for website.'; requires reverse ETL plan, preview, approval, and typed destructive confirmation

actions.name: submit_spam_conversation_decision
actions.risk: medium risk Crisp mutation for 'Submits decision on spam conversation (this allows to accepts or rejects a spam). If rejected, a spam message will be gone forever. If accepted, it will get transformed into a regular conversation.'; requires reverse ETL plan, preview, and approval

actions.name: create_new_conversation
actions.risk: medium risk Crisp mutation for 'Creates a new conversation.'; requires reverse ETL plan, preview, and approval

actions.name: remove_conversation
actions.risk: high risk Crisp destructive mutation for 'Removes a conversation in website.'; requires reverse ETL plan, preview, approval, and typed destructive confirmation

actions.name: initiate_conversation_existing_session
actions.risk: medium risk Crisp mutation for 'Initiates a conversation from an existing session.'; requires reverse ETL plan, preview, and approval

actions.name: send_message_conversation
actions.risk: medium risk Crisp mutation for 'Sends a message in an existing conversation.'; requires reverse ETL plan, preview, and approval

actions.name: update_message_conversation
actions.risk: medium risk Crisp mutation for 'Edits an existing message in an existing conversation.'; requires reverse ETL plan, preview, and approval

actions.name: remove_message_conversation
actions.risk: high risk Crisp destructive mutation for 'Removes an existing message in an existing conversation. Used to retract a previously-sent message.'; requires reverse ETL plan, preview, approval, and typed destructive confirmation

actions.name: compose_message_conversation
actions.risk: medium risk Crisp mutation for 'Starts or stop composing a message in an existing conversation. This route is used for MagicType preview.'; requires reverse ETL plan, preview, and approval

actions.name: mark_messages_as_read_conversation
actions.risk: medium risk Crisp mutation for 'Marks messages as read in conversation. Either using given message fingerprints, or all messages.'; requires reverse ETL plan, preview, and approval

actions.name: mark_conversation_as_unread
actions.risk: medium risk Crisp mutation for 'Marks whole conversation as unread.'; requires reverse ETL plan, preview, and approval

actions.name: mark_messages_as_delivered_conversation
actions.risk: medium risk Crisp mutation for 'Marks messages as delivered in conversation.'; requires reverse ETL plan, preview, and approval

actions.name: update_conversation_open_state
actions.risk: medium risk Crisp mutation for 'Updates conversation open state for authenticated operator user. Lets other operators see which conversation people are on at any given moment. This state automatically expires after a while, if not renewed.'; requires reverse ETL plan, preview, and approval

actions.name: assign_conversation_routing
actions.risk: medium risk Crisp mutation for 'Assigns conversation routing to an operator, or unassign.'; requires reverse ETL plan, preview, and approval

actions.name: update_conversation_inbox
actions.risk: medium risk Crisp mutation for 'Updates inbox used for conversation.'; requires reverse ETL plan, preview, and approval

actions.name: update_conversation_metas
actions.risk: medium risk Crisp mutation for 'Updates conversation meta information.'; requires reverse ETL plan, preview, and approval

actions.name: change_conversation_state
actions.risk: medium risk Crisp mutation for 'Updates conversation state (resolved, unresolved or pending).'; requires reverse ETL plan, preview, and approval

actions.name: save_conversation_participants
actions.risk: medium risk Crisp mutation for 'Saves conversation participants (external participants, eg. emails to be set in CC).'; requires reverse ETL plan, preview, and approval

actions.name: block_incoming_messages_conversation
actions.risk: medium risk Crisp mutation for 'Blocks further incoming messages from a conversation. Messages from visitor will be silently dropped, but you can still send messages to visitor.'; requires reverse ETL plan, preview, and approval

actions.name: update_verify_status_conversation
actions.risk: medium risk Crisp mutation for 'Updates conversation verify status. When a conversation user is verified, a verified badge shows in the Crisp apps.'; requires reverse ETL plan, preview, and approval

actions.name: request_identity_verification_conversation
actions.risk: medium risk Crisp mutation for 'Requests a verification of an identity channel for conversation. Verifying a channel automatically marks the whole conversation as verified, showing a verified badge in the Crisp apps.'; requires reverse ETL plan, preview, and approval

actions.name: redeem_identity_verification_link_conversation
actions.risk: medium risk Crisp mutation for 'Redeems a verification link to verify an identity channel for conversation.'; requires reverse ETL plan, preview, and approval

actions.name: request_email_transcript_conversation
actions.risk: medium risk Crisp mutation for 'Requests an email transcript for a conversation. The transcript is emailed to the authenticated user, or to the indicated email. It contains all conversation history and may be kept for as an external record.'; requires reverse ETL plan, preview, and approval

actions.name: request_chatbox_binding_purge_conversation
actions.risk: high risk Crisp destructive mutation for 'Requests a chatbox binding purge for conversation. The visitor must be online for the purge to be proceeded.'; requires reverse ETL plan, preview, approval, and typed destructive confirmation

actions.name: request_user_feedback_conversation
actions.risk: medium risk Crisp mutation for 'Requests feedback from user for conversation. The visitor must be online for the feedback request to be delivered.'; requires reverse ETL plan, preview, and approval

actions.name: initiate_browsing_session_conversation
actions.risk: medium risk Crisp mutation for 'Initiates browsing session for conversation.'; requires reverse ETL plan, preview, and approval

actions.name: send_action_existing_browsing_session
actions.risk: medium risk Crisp mutation for 'Sends an action to an existing browsing session. Used to send stream actions to a browsing session (eg. to start or stop the stream session).'; requires reverse ETL plan, preview, and approval

actions.name: assist_existing_browsing_session
actions.risk: medium risk Crisp mutation for 'Assists an existing browsing session. Used by LiveAssist™ to start or stop an assist session, used by operators to take control on the screen of user browser (mouse move and scroll).'; requires reverse ETL plan, preview, and approval

actions.name: initiate_new_call_session_conversation
actions.risk: medium risk Crisp mutation for 'Initiates a new audio/video call session for conversation.'; requires reverse ETL plan, preview, and approval

actions.name: abort_ongoing_call_session_conversation
actions.risk: high risk Crisp destructive mutation for 'Aborts the ongoing audio/video call session for conversation.'; requires reverse ETL plan, preview, approval, and typed destructive confirmation

actions.name: transmit_signaling_ongoing_call_session
actions.risk: medium risk Crisp mutation for 'Transmits a signaling payload for the ongoing audio/video call session for conversation.'; requires reverse ETL plan, preview, and approval

actions.name: request_tool_call_conversation
actions.risk: medium risk Crisp mutation for 'Requests a new WebMCP tool call on the chatbox widget for conversation.'; requires reverse ETL plan, preview, and approval

actions.name: deliver_widget_button_action_conversation
actions.risk: high risk Crisp administrative mutation for 'Delivers a button action on plugin widget for conversation, used to perform an action on the plugin, eg. refund a user. A hook will be sent to the plugin widget receiver.'; requires reverse ETL plan, preview, approval, and typed confirmation when prompted

actions.name: deliver_widget_data_action_conversation
actions.risk: high risk Crisp administrative mutation for 'Delivers a data action on plugin widget for conversation, used to either fetch or edit a data value from the plugin, eg. fetch a user unpaid balance. A hook will be sent to the plugin widget receiver.'; requires reverse ETL plan, preview, approval, and typed confirmation when prompted

actions.name: schedule_reminder_conversation
actions.risk: medium risk Crisp mutation for 'Schedules a reminder in the future for conversation, with a note to your future-self. A push notification and an email will be sent, as well as a note in the conversation.'; requires reverse ETL plan, preview, and approval

actions.name: report_conversation
actions.risk: high risk Crisp destructive mutation for 'Reports a conversation to Crisp and remove it from the inbox. This can be used to move an entire conversation to spams.'; requires reverse ETL plan, preview, approval, and typed destructive confirmation
